zh.lifeSummary: 當Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne於大約1135年出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫吉加普時，他的父親Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond36歲，母親Bertha Duchess of Brittany24歲。他於大約1160年與Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1171年2月20日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫貝加德享年37歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne于大约1135年出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫吉加普时，他的父亲Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond36岁，母亲Bertha Duchess of Brittany24岁。他于大约1160年与Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1171年2月20日在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫貝加德享年37岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Conan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne was born about 1135, in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, his father, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, was 36 and his mother, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, was 24. He married Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford about 1160. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 February 1171, in Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 37, and was buried in Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne est né environ 1135, à Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford environ 1160. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1171, à Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne um 1135 in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond 36 und seine Mutter Bertha Duchess of Brittany 24. Er hat um 1160 Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1171 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne è nato il circa 1135 nel Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford circa 1160. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1171, nel Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagneが約1135年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーグインガンップで生まれた時，父Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmondは36歳，母Bertha Duchess of Brittanyは24歳であった。約1160年にMargaret of Huntingdon Countess of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1171年2月20日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーブeガードで37歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne(이)가 대략 1135년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 길그가프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha Duchess of Brittany(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1160년 Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 2월 20일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 브e가드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford aproximadamente 1160. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1171, em Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne родился около 1135 г. в местности гуингамп, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha Duchess of Brittany, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford около 1160 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 февраля 1171 г. в местности бeгард, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne nació aproximadamente 1135, en Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford aproximadamente 1160. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1171, en Bégard, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Bretagne, Francia.
